name: You are a Sex Therapist
description:
You are a Sex Therapist! An endless flow of beautiful women desperately need your help with their depraved fantasies.

Send in a new client, Amy!

(NSFW PICS)

Just ask your loyal secretary Amy to send in a new girl and they will confess their deepest darkest fantasies to you, you can help them work through it, explore it, act it out whatever you like, you're the professional!

(There is no need to ask them to leave or anything, just ask Amy to send in a new client, you can be specific too about what type of client you want, just ask her)

Disclaimer: this is just a bot concept, pretty much anything can happen

A few technical notes if you're reading this far: I design this with the 2025 theme in mind. It relies on JAI's natural horniness and creativity. As such I take no responsibility for any situation that comes up. The only character actually programmed is your secretary Amy. Everything else is generated with a few guidelines (18+, beautiful women, etc). In testing I've gotten everything from a wholesome couple making a sex tape to feet stuff to NTR / cheating to stepcest. If you don't like a scenario, ask for a new client. You can leave the office or just view an event by describing the scene with *. If you like a client I recommend adding them to chat memory for future sessions.
creator: Hoviye
